overview.description: Technology and design consultancy with AI & Data, embedded solutions, safety and security, and product design services
overview.description_long: Huld (now part of Gofore Group) is a Finnish technology and design company with a Prague office, offering Digital Services & Software, Product Design, Embedded Solutions, and Safety & Security. Their AI & Data practice covers computer vision, data science, OCR, semantic search, safety-critical AI, and autonomous navigation across industrial sectors. Key customers include ABB, Airbus, ESA, KONE, Metso, Valmet, and Wärtsilä.
overview.tagline: Bold Ideas with a Human Touch

history.origin_story: Founded in 2010 in Finland as a technology and design company focused on intelligent industry sectors. Acquired by Gofore Plc in September 2025 for ~€41M; brand merger into Gofore effective April 2026.

key_milestones.event: Gofore acquires Huld for ~€41M (enterprise value €54.5M), expanding into Intelligent Industry and Security sectors

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Huld's core value lies in deep domain expertise for safety-critical industries (space, defence, medical devices, functional safety certification). These require certified engineers, regulatory compliance, and hands-on hardware integration — areas where AI cannot substitute for certified human experts in the near term.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established 15-year company with blue-chip industrial clients (KONE, Airbus, ESA, ABB, Wärtsilä) and €38.2M revenue in 2024. Serves multiple growing sectors including space technology and defence, both of which are expanding in Europe.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Acquired by Gofore Plc (publicly traded on Nasdaq Helsinki) in September 2025. Backed by a large parent company with stable financial footing; funding risk does not apply.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Deep engineering moat in regulated, safety-critical industries combined with acquisition by a publicly traded parent eliminates funding risk. AGI is unlikely to displace certified safety engineers and embedded systems specialists in the near term.

metadata.notes: Huld is a Finnish company (HQ Espoo) with a Prague office. It was acquired by Gofore Plc in September 2025 and the brand merges into Gofore in April 2026. Founded year: Gofore press release says 2010; PitchBook says 2001 — used 2010 from official acquisition announcement. Revenue converted from EUR at approximate rate.
